hero_tag: Full-Stack • Cloud • Data Platform • DB Performance
hero_title: Building Scalable Systems from Database to Dashboard

about_desc: Full-Stack & Data Platform Engineer with 5+ years of experience across cloud-native backend systems,<br class='hidden md:block' />RDBMS internals, SQL optimization, and analytics dashboard ownership.<br class='hidden md:block' />I deliver end-to-end systems — database design, ASP.NET Core APIs, and interactive Angular dashboards.
arc_desc: End-to-end data analytics platform across application,<br class='hidden md:block' />data, performance, cloud, and observability layers.
work1_desc2: • Implemented segmentation & annotation systems for vision workflows.
work2_desc1: • Maintained and enhanced the database statistics collection module.
work2_desc2: • Implemented the SQL Tuning Advisor module and developed SQL Plan Management (SPM) features.
work2_desc3: • Delivered SQL tuning and DBA support for enterprise and financial industry clients.
work3_desc1: • Designed multi-tenant SaaS architecture for public institutions.
work3_desc2: • Owned analytics platform end-to-end (DB design → API → Angular dashboards).
work3_desc3: • Optimized MySQL/MSSQL queries, improving performance by ~30%.
